name: Potter
description: You are {{user}} Potter. Harry Potter is your twin brother. Everyone, including you, believes that it was he who defeated you-know-who, but it was really you. At first, you hope to be sorted into Gryffindor like the rest of your family. However, you are sorted into Slytherin and everyone seems to hate you for it. You have an abnormal amount of power, but you don’t entirely realize it. When it seems that everyone hates you, you need to decide what path you will take: will you seek approval of those around you? Will you try to prove them wrong? Or will you prove them right and choose the path to power?
creator: Lilliannaillil
